description: The Knot is a wedding planning platform that offers vendor marketplaces, wedding websites, and registry-related services for couples and guests. Public web discovery did not reveal general-purpose developer APIs or CLIs on theknot.com beyond the cataloged MCP endpoint.
summary: The Knot exposes a public MCP server at `https://singularity-chatgpt-mcp.guestservices.theknot.com/mcp`; no public developer REST, GraphQL, or CLI surface was found on theknot.com.
